skills.descriptionBR: Kinaku ataca um inimigo com sua ferramenta preciosa, causando 25 de dano de aflição a eles. Por 1 turno, qualquer inimigo que usar uma nova habilidade non-mental em Kinkaku irá receber 10 de dano afltiivo.

skills.name: Bashousen: Coil of Fire
skills.description: Kinkaku uses his treasured tool to generate a wave of flames, dealing 15 affliction damage to all enemies permanently. During this time, they will have the cooldown of their skills increased by 2 turns. This skill will end on an enemy when they use any new skill.
skills.descriptionBR: Kinkaku usa sua ferramenta preciosa para gerar uma onda de chamas, causando 15 de dano de aflição a todos os inimigos permanentemente. Durante esse tempo, eles terão o tempo de recarga de suas habilidades aumentado em 2 turnos. Esta habilidade terminará em um inimigo quando ele usar qualquer nova habilidade.

skills.name: Koukinjou Counter
skills.description: Kinkaku targets an enemy for 1 turn. If that enemy uses a new harmful skill, they will be countered and will be dealt 25 damage. If successful, that enemy will also receive 10 additional damage from 'Bashousen: Assault' for 1 turn. This skill is invisible.
skills.descriptionBR: Kinkaku mira um inimigo por 1 turno. Se esse inimigo usar uma nova habilidade prejudicial, ele será contra-atacado e receberá 25 de dano. Se for bem-sucedido, esse inimigo também receberá 10 de dano adicional de 'Bashousen: Assault' por 1 turno. Esta habilidade é invisível.

skills.name: Koukinjou Block
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Kinkaku (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade faz Edo Tensei Kinkaku (S) <Defense>invulnerável<Defense> por 1 turno.

skills.name: Silver Brothers: Kyuubi Passive
skills.description: After dealing a total of 100 damage during the game, Kinkaku will transform into his Tailed Beast Mode, healing 25 health instantly, then gaining 10 points of pierceable damage reduction and healing 5 health permanently.
skills.descriptionBR: Após causar um total de 100 de dano durante o jogo, Kinkaku se transformará em seu Modo Besta com Cauda, curando 25 de vida instantaneamente, ganhando 10 pontos de redução de dano perfurável e curando 5 de vida permanentemente.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Ginkaku (S)
characters.description: Edo Tensei Ginkaku (S) is one half of the legendary gold and silver brothers of the Hidden Cloud Village. They were the most notorious criminals in the history of the Hidden Cloud.
characters.descriptionBR: Edo Tensei Ginkaku (S) é metade dos lendários irmãos de ouro e prata da Vila Oculta da Nuvem. Eles foram os criminosos mais notórios da história da Vila Oculta da Nuvem.

skills.name: Shichiseiken Slash
skills.description: Ginkaku deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy. For this turn, any new stun effects used on that enemy will last 1 additional turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Ginkaku causa 20 de dano perfurante a um inimigo. Por este turno, qualquer novo efeito de atordoamento usado nesse inimigo durará 1 turno adicional.

skills.name: Silence is Golden
skills.description: Ginkaku politely approaches an enemy, dealing 10 piercing damage to that enemy and stunning their skills for 1 turn. During this time, that enemy will become invulnerable to helpful skills and will receive 5 additional melee damage.
skills.descriptionBR: Ginkaku se aproxima educadamente de um inimigo, causando 10 de dano perfurante a esse inimigo e atordoando suas habilidades por 1 turno. Durante esse tempo, esse inimigo se tornará invulnerável a habilidades úteis e receberá 5 de dano adicional de ataques corpo a corpo.

skills.name: Benihisago
skills.description: Ginkaku targets one enemy, selecting one random skill from that enemy for 3 turns. The next time that enemy uses the selected skill, they will be countered and Shichiseiken Slash will deal 5 additional damage to the countered enemy permanently. The selected skill is invisible.
skills.descriptionBR: Ginkaku seleciona um inimigo, escolhendo uma habilidade aleatória desse inimigo por 3 turnos. Na próxima vez que esse inimigo usar a habilidade selecionada, ele será contra-atacado e Shichiseiken Slash causará 5 de dano adicional ao inimigo contra-atacado permanentemente. A habilidade selecionada é invisível.

skills.name: Shichiseiken Defense
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Ginkaku (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade faz Edo Tensei Ginkaku (S) <Defense>invulnerável<Defense> por 1 turno.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Nagato (S)
characters.description: Edo Tensei Nagato (S) has been summoned to do battle. He is fully aware of the fact that he is being controlled again as he was while he was living.
characters.descriptionBR: Edo Tensei Nagato (S) foi invocado para lutar. Ele está totalmente ciente do fato de que está sendo controlado novamente, assim como era quando estava vivo.

skills.name: Human Path
skills.description: Nagato draws out the lifeforce of an enemy, <Damage>stealing 10 health<Damage> and <Damage>dealing 20 damage<Damage>. That enemy will be <Effects>stunned<Effects> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Nagato extrai a força vital de um inimigo, <Damage>roubando 10 de vida<Damage> e <Damage>causando 20 de dano<Damage>. As habilidades desse inimigo serão <Effects>atordoadas<Effects> por 1 turno.

skills.name: Preta Path
skills.description: Nagato drains an enemy's energy, <Damage>stealing 10 health points<Damage> and <Effects>removing 1 taijutsu or ninjutsu chakra<Effects> from their chakra <Effects>pool<Effects>.
skills.descriptionBR: Nagato drena a energia de um inimigo, <Damage>roubando 10 pontos de vida<Damage> e <Effects> removendo 1 taijutsu ou ninjutsu chakra<Effects> da <Effects>reserva<Effects> de chakra dele.

skills.name: Animal Path
skills.description: Nagato summons various animals and creatures, <Damage>dealing 10 damage<Damage> to all enemies for 2 turns. The following 2 turns, any enemy that uses a <Classes>new skill<Classes> on Edo Tensei Nagato will be *<Damage>dealt 10 piercing damage<Damage>.
skills.descriptionBR: Nagato invoca diversos animais e criaturas, <Damage>causando 10 de dano<Damage> a todos os inimigos por 2 turnos. Nos 2 turnos seguintes, qualquer inimigo que usar uma <Classes>nova habilidade<Classes> em Edo Tensei Nagato <Damage>receberá *10 de dano perfurante<Damage>.

skills.name: Naraka Path
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Nagato (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade faz Edo Tensei Nagato (S) <Defense>invulnerável<Defense> por 1 turno.

characters.name: ET Sandaime Raikage (S)
characters.description: Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) is not pleased to be back among the living and forced to do battle. He does however have faith that the new generation of shinobi can defeat him and his peers.
characters.descriptionBR: Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) não está satisfeito por estar de volta entre os vivos e ser forçado a lutar. No entanto, ele tem fé de que a nova geração de shinobi pode derrotá-lo, assim como seus companheiros.

skills.name: Four Finger Nukite
skills.description: Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) uses Four Finger Nukite on one enemy <Damage>dealing 25 piercing damage<Damage>*. Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) gains 25% <Defense>damage reduction<Defense> permanently when this skill is used. This skill becomes <SkillName>'Three Finger Nukite'<SkillName> permanently when used.
skills.descriptionBR: Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) usa Four Finger Nukite em um inimigo, <Damage>causando 25 de dano perfurante<Damage>*. Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) ganha 25% de <Defense>redução de dano<Defense> permanentemente ao usar esta habilidade. Esta habilidade se torna <SkillName>'Three Finger Nukite'<SkillName> permanentemente após ser usada.

skills.name: Lightning Release Shockwave
skills.description: Using Lightning Release Shockwave Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) targets one enemy <Damage>dealing 30 damage<Damage>. One random enemy will be <Damage>dealt 30 damage<Damage> that <Effects>ignores invulnerability<Effects>.
skills.descriptionBR: Usando Lightning Release Shockwave, Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) atinge um inimigo <Damage>causando 30 de dano<Damage>. Um inimigo aleatório <Damage>receberá 30 de dano<Damage> que <Effects>ignora invulnerabilidade<Effects>.

skills.name: One Finger Nukite Spear
skills.description: Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) uses One Finger Nukite Spear on one enemy <Damage>dealing 50 piercing damage<Damage>. This skill <Classes>cannot be countered<Classes> or <Classes>reflected<Classes>.
skills.descriptionBR: Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) usa One Finger Nukite Spear em um inimigo, <Damage>causando 50 de dano perfurante<Damage>. Esta <Classes>habilidade não pode ser counterada<Classes> ou <Classes>refletida<Classes>.

skills.name: Immense Speed
skills.description: This skill makes ET Sandaime Raikage (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade faz ET Sandaime Raikage (S) <Defense>invulnerável<Defense> por 1 turno.

skills.name: Three Finger Nukite
skills.description: Using Three Finger Nukite Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) gains 50% <Defense>damage reduction<Defense> permanently. <SkillName>'One Finger Nukite Spear'<SkillName> can be used on all enemies permanently when this skill is used. This skill can only be used once and <Classes>cannot be removed<Classes>.
skills.descriptionBR: Ao usar Three Finger Nukite, Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) ganha 50% de <Defense>redução de dano<Defense> permanentemente. <SkillName>'One Finger Nukite Spear'<SkillName> pode ser usada em todos os inimigos permanentemente ao usar esta habilidade. Esta habilidade só pode ser usada uma vez e <Classes>não pode ser removida<Classes>.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Muu (S)
characters.description: Muu, the Second Tsuchikage, was revived against his will to fight. He is a skilled spy, capable of infiltrating the battlefield undetected, in addition to his Kekkei Touta, the atomic detachment, capable of turning enemies into dust in a matter of moments.
characters.descriptionBR: Muu, o Segundo Tsuchikage, foi revivido contra sua vontade para lutar. Ele é um espião habilidoso, capaz de se infiltrar no campo de batalha sem ser detectado, além de possuir o Kekkei Touta, o desmembramento atômico, capaz de transformar inimigos em pó em questão de segundos.

skills.name: Fission
skills.description: ET Muu grant himself or one ally 50% of <Defense>unpierceable damage reduction points<Defense> for 1 turn. During this turn, any enemy that <Classes>uses a new skill<Classes> on that ally <Improvements>will receive 5 additional damage<Improvements> from <Classes>non-affliction<Classes> skills permanently. <Invisible>This skill is invisible<Invisible>.
skills.descriptionBR: ET Muu concede a si mesmo ou a um aliado 50% de <Defense>pontos de redução de dano impenetrável<Defense> por 1 turno. Durante este turno, qualquer inimigo que <Classes>usar uma nova habilidade<Classes> nesse aliado <Improvements>receberá 5 de dano adicional<Improvements> de <Classes>habilidades não aflitivas<Classes> permanentemente. <Invisible>Esta habilidade é invisível<Invisible>.

skills.name: Atomic Detachment
skills.description: ET Muu <Damage>deals 20 damage<Damage> to one enemy and an additional <Damage>15 piercing damage<Damage> the first turn and <Damage>10 piercing damage<Damage> the following turn. During this time, that enemy's skills <Effects>will cost 1 additional random chakra<Effects>. This skill <Classes>ends<Classes> if that enemy uses a <Classes>new skill<Classes>.
skills.descriptionBR: ET Muu <Damage>causa 20 de dano<Damage> a um inimigo e <Damage>15 de dano perfurante<Damage> adicional no primeiro turno e <Damage>10 de dano perfurante<Damage> no turno seguinte. Durante esse tempo, as habilidades desse inimigo <Effects>custarão 1 chakra aleatório adicional<Effects>. Esta habilidade <Classes>termina<Classes> se esse inimigo usar uma <Classes>nova habilidade<Classes>.

skills.name: Chameleon Covering
skills.description: ET Muu makes himself or one ally <Defense>ignore all harmful effects except damage<Defense> for 1 turn. If the protected character receive a new <Classes>harmful<Classes> skill, <SkillName>'Atomic Detachment1<SkillName> will <Improvements>cost 2 random chakra<Improvements> for 1 turn. <Invisible>This skill is invisible<Invisible>.
skills.descriptionBR: ET Muu faz com que ele mesmo ou um aliado <Defense>ignore todos os efeitos ofensivos exceto dano<Defense> por 1 turno. Se o personagem protegido receber uma nova habilidade <Classes>ofensiva<Classes>, <SkillName>'Atomic Detachment'<SkillName> <Improvements>custará 2 chakras aleatórios<Improvements> por 1 turno. <Invisible>Esta habilidade é invisível<Invisible>.

skills.name: Sensorial Awareness
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Muu (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade faz Edo Tensei Muu (S) <Defense>invulnerável<Defense> por 1 turno.

characters.name: ET Nidaime Mizukage (S)
characters.description: Edo Tensei Nidaime Mizukage (S) has been resurrected against his will to do battle. He does not want to hurt anyone but he is interested in the potential of the new generation. He will test their limits with his own skill.
characters.descriptionBR: Edo Tensei Nidaime Mizukage (S) foi ressuscitado contra sua vontade de lutar. Ele não quer machucar ninguém, mas está interessado no potencial da nova geração. Ele testará seus limites com suas próprias habilidades.

skills.name: Major Summoning: Giant Clam
skills.description: Gengetsu summons a huge clam that exudes illsory mist, granting his team 30 points of <Defense>destructible defense<Defense> for 3 turns. Each turn, a random member of his team becoms a mirage, <Defense>nullyfing<Defense> the <Classes>first harmful skill<Classes> used on them for 1 turn; The target is <Invisible>invisible<Invisible>. This skill <Classes>ends<Classes> if Gengetsu is <Classes>killed<Classes>.
skills.descriptionBR: Gengetsu invoca um molusco enorme que exala uma névoa ilusória, concedendo à sua equipe 30 <Defense>pontos de defesa destrutível<Defense> por 3 turnos. A cada turno, um membro aleatório da sua equipe se torna uma miragem, <Defense>anulando<Defense> a <Classes>primeira habilidade prejudicial<Classes> usada nele por 1 turno; o alvo fica <Invisible>invisível<Invisible>. Esta habilidade <Classes>termina<Classes> se Gengetsu for <Classes>morto<Classes>.

skills.name: Hozuki Water Gun
skills.description: Gengetsu fires a drop of water like a bullet at one enemy, <Damage>dealing 20 piercing damage<Damage> to them. If that enemy's <Defense>health<Defense> drops to 10 or less, they will be <Classes>killed<Classes>. During <SkillName>'Major Summoning: Giant Clam'<SkillName>, this skill will <Improvements>deal 5 additional damage<Improvements> and wll kill enemy if they health drop 15 or less.
skills.descriptionBR: Gengetsu dispara uma gota d'água como uma bala em um inimigo, causando <Damage>20 de dano perfurante<Damage>. Se a <Defense>vida<Defense> do inimigo cair para 10 ou menos, ele será <Classes>morto<Classes>. Durante <SkillName>'Major Summoning: Giant Clam'<SkillName>, esta habilidade causará <Improvements>5 de dano adicional<Improvements> e matara o inimigo se ele tiver 15 ou menos de vida.

skills.name: Steam Imp
skills.description: For 1 turn, Gengetsu makes his team <Defense>ignore all stun effects<Defense>. If targetable, all enemies will be <Damage>dealt 10 affliction damage<Damage>. During <SkillName>'Major Summoning: Giant Clam'<SkillName>, this skill <Improvements>will last 1 additional turn<Improvements>.
skills.descriptionBR: Por 1 turno, Gengetsu faz com que sua equipe <Defense>ignore todos os efeitos de atordoamento<Defense>. Se puder alvejar, todos os inimigos <Damage>receberão 10 de dano por aflição<Damage>. Durante <SkillName>'Major Summoning: Giant Clam'<SkillName>, esta habilidade<Improvements>durará 1 turno adicional<Improvements>.

skills.name: Genjutsu Defense
skills.description: This skill makes ET Nidaime Mizukage (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade faz ET Nidaime Mizukage (S) <Defense>invulnerável<Defense> por 1 turno.

skills.name: Mirage
skills.description: While <SkillName>'Major Summoning: Giant Clam'<SkillName> is active, this skill will be applied to a random member of Gengetsu's team. For 1 turn, the target will <Defense>ignore<Defense> the <Classes>first harmful skill<Classes> used on them. <Invisible>This skill is invisible<Invisible>.
skills.descriptionBR: Enquanto <SkillName>'Major Summoning: Giant Clam'<SkillName> estiver ativa, esta habilidade será aplicada a um membro aleatório da equipe de Gengetsu. Por 1 turno, o alvo irá <Defense>ignorar<Defense> a <Classes>primeira habilidade ofensiva<Classes> usada nele. <Invisible>Esta habilidade é invisível<Invisible>

characters.name: Edo Tensei Itachi (S)
characters.description: One of the five past Akatsuki members reanimated by Kabuto during the Fourth Shinobi World War, Itachi sees this as an opportunity to pursue his true goals and set things right with Naruto and Sasuke. Freeing himself from Kabuto's shackles, Itachi unleashes the full power of the Uchiha with his deathless body.
characters.descriptionBR: Um dos cinco antigos membros da Akatsuki reanimados por Kabuto durante a Quarta Grande Guerra Ninja, Itachi vê isso como uma oportunidade para perseguir seus verdadeiros objetivos e consertar as coisas com Naruto e Sasuke. Libertando-se das correntes de Kabuto, Itachi libera todo o poder do Uchiha com seu corpo imortal.

skills.name: Phoenix Flower Shuriken
skills.description: Itachi unleashes a volley of fire-infused shuriken, dealing 10 affliction damage to all enemies. For 1 turn, if they use a new harmful skill, they will have 'Phoenix Flower Shuriken' re-applied on them.
skills.descriptionBR: Itachi libera uma rajada de shurikens infundidas com fogo, causando 10 de dano aflitivo a todos os inimigos. Por 1 turno, se eles usarem uma nova habilidade ofensiva, 'Phoenix Flower Shuriken' será reaplicada a eles.

skills.name: Demonic Illusion: Mirage Crow
skills.description: For 2 turns, one enemy will be unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable and will take 15 damage each turn. During this time, Itachi will become invulnerable to that enemy's skills.
skills.descriptionBR: Por 2 turnos, um inimigo não poderá reduzir dano nem se tornar invulnerável e irá receber 15 de dano a cada turno. Durante esse tempo, Itachi se tornará invulnerável às habilidades desse inimigo.

skills.name: Passive: Edo Tensei Sharingan
skills.description: Each turn, this skill will randomly switch between 'Izanami', 'Itachi Mangekyou Sharingan', and 'Itachi Kotoamatsukami'. Each of these skills can only be used once per game. This passive is invisible.
skills.descriptionBR: A cada turno, essa habilidade irá alternar aleatoriamente entre 'Izanami', 'Itachi Mangekyou Sharingan' e 'Itachi Kotoamatsukami'. Cada uma dessas habilidades só pode ser usada uma vez por jogo. Essa passiva é invisível.

skills.name: Itachi Block
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Itachi (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade faz Edo Tensei Itachi (S) <Defense>invulnerável<Defense> por 1 turno.

skills.name: Edo Tensei Mangekyou Sharingan
skills.description:
This skill can only be used once to apply both 'Amaterasu' and 'Tsukuyomi' on an enemy; This skill ends when Itachi killed.
Amaterasu: Deals 15 affliction damage instantly, and 5 affliction permanently.
Tsukuyomi: Fully stuns the enemy's skills for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR:
Essa habilidade só pode ser usada uma vez para aplicar tanto 'Amaterasu' quanto 'Tsukuyomi' em um inimigo; Essa habilidade termina quando Itachi morrer.
Amaterasu: Causa 15 de dano aflitivo instantaneamente, e 5 de dano aflitivo permanentemente.
Tsukuyomi: Atordoa completamente as habilidades do inimigo por 1 turno.

skills.name: Edo Tensei Kotoamatsukami
skills.description: This skill can only be used once to target Itachi or an ally permanently. The next time the marked target's health drops to 5 or less, they will instantly heal to 35 health, and then heal 5 health for the following 3 turns. This skill is invisible until triggered.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade só pode ser usada uma vez para alvejar Itachi ou um aliado permanentemente. Na próxima vez que a vida do alvo marcado cair para 5 ou menos, ele irá curar instantaneamente para 35 de vida, e então curará 5 de vida nos próximos 3 turnos. Essa habilidade é invisível até ser ativada.

skills.name: Izanami
skills.description: This skill can only be used once to target an enemy permanently. The next time that enemy uses a new skill, they will be countered and this skill will end. If successful, the countered skill will be stunned for 3 turns; This duration is increased by the skill's current cooldown. This skill is invisible until triggered.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade só pode ser usada uma vez para alvejar um inimigo permanentemente. Na próxima vez que esse inimigo usar uma nova habilidade, ele será counterado e essa habilidade irá terminar. Se for bem-sucedida, a habilidade counterada terá seu cooldown atual aumentado em 3. Essa habilidade é invisível até ser ativada.

characters.name: ET Susanoo Itachi (S)
characters.description: Having been reanimated once more, Itachi now manifests the full power of his Susanoo in battle. Shielded by the Yata Mirror and wielding the sealing Totsuka Blade, he becomes a relentless force that blends absolute defense with lethal precision.
characters.descriptionBR: Tendo sido reanimado mais uma vez, Itachi agora manifesta todo o poder de seu Susanoo em batalha. Protegido pelo Espelho Yata e empunhando a seladora Lâmina Totsuka, ele se torna uma força implacável que combina defesa absoluta com precisão letal.

skills.name: Totsuka Blade Sealing
skills.description: Itachi seals one enemy with his Susanoo's legendary blade, dealing 35 affliction damage to them, removing 1 random chakra and stunning their skills for 1 turn. This skill cannot be countered or reflected. This skill requires 'Edo Tensei Susanoo'.
skills.descriptionBR: Itachi sela um inimigo com a lendária lâmina de seu Susanoo, causando 35 de dano aflitivo a ele, removendo 1 chakra aleatório e atordoando suas habilidades por 1 turno. Essa habilidade não pode ser counterada ou refletida. Essa habilidade requer 'Edo Tensei Susanoo'.

skills.name: Interrupting Slice
skills.description: Itachi deals 15 piercing damage to one enemy. Permanently, that enemy will deal 5 less non-affliction damage. This skill requires 'Edo Tensei Susanoo'.
skills.descriptionBR: Itachi causa 15 de dano perfurante a um inimigo. Permanentemente, esse inimigo irá causar 5 a menos de dano não-aflitivo. Essa habilidade requer 'Edo Tensei Susanoo'.

skills.name: Skeletal Blade
skills.description: Using his Susanoo's skeletal blade, Itachi deals 20 piercing damage to them. Permanently, that enemy will receive 5 additional damage from harmful skills. This skill requires 'Edo Tensei Susanoo'.
skills.descriptionBR: Usando a lâmina esquelética de seu Susanoo, Itachi causa 20 de dano perfurante a ele. Permanentemente, esse inimigo irá receber 5 de dano adicional de habilidades ofensivas. Essa habilidade requer 'Edo Tensei Susanoo'.

skills.name: Edo Tensei Susanoo
skills.description: After this skill is used, the next time Itachi's health drops to 50 or less, Itachi's Susanoo will evolve to the next stage, improving his skills for the following 3 turns. During this time, Itachi's skills will steal health instead. During this time, this skill will be replaced by 'Yasaka Magatama'. Itachi cannot be killed until this skill is triggered.
skills.descriptionBR: Após essa habilidade for usada, na próxima vez que a vida de Itachi cair para 50 ou menos, seu Susanoo evoluirá para o próximo estágio, aprimorando suas habilidades pelos próximos 3 turnos. Durante essempo, as habilidades de Itachi irão roubar vida. Durante esse tempo, essa habilidade será substituída por 'Yasaka Magatama'. Itachi não pode morrer até que essa habilidade seja ativada.

skills.name: Yasaka Magatama
skills.description: Itachi unleashes his strongest long-range technique, dealing 40 piercing damage to all enemies. This skill cannot be countered.
skills.descriptionBR: Itachi libera sua técnica de longo alcance mais poderosa, causando 40 de dano perfurante a todos os inimigos. Essa habilidade não pode ser counterada.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Yota (S)
characters.description: A young child from a nomadic clan, Yota died at an early age, but was revived through Edo Tensei by Orochimaru and kept alive for years as a test subject. A curious, naïve, and sensitive boy, Yota can manipulate the weather around himself, and is deployed by Kabuto to fight in the Fourth Shinobi World War.
characters.descriptionBR: Uma jovem criança de um clã nômade, Yota morreu ainda muito novo, mas foi revivido pelo Edo Tensei de Orochimaru e mantido vivo por anos como cobaia. Um garoto curioso, ingênuo e sensível, Yota é capaz de manipular o clima ao seu redor, sendo enviado por Kabuto para lutar na Quarta Guerra Mundial Ninja.

skills.name: Weather Manipulation Rain: Water Wave
skills.description: Yota cries, and a sudden wave crashes down on a random enemy, <Damage>dealing 15 damage<Damage> to them, and after <Classes>targets 0 random enemies<Classes>, <Damage>dealing 15 damage<Damage> to each one of them. This skill will <Improvements>target 1 additional random enemy<Improvements> for each <SkillName>'Rain Stack'<SkillName> that Yota <Effects>has<Effects>. Afterwards, Yota gains 1 <SkillName>'Rain Stack'<SkillName>.
skills.descriptionBR: Yota chora, e uma onda repentina despenca sobre um inimigo aleatório, <Damage>causando 15 de dano<Damage> a ele, e depois <Classes>atinge 0 inimigos aleatórios<Classes>, <Damage>causando 15 de dano<Damage> a cada um deles. Esta habilidade irá <Improvements>atingir 1 inimigo aleatório adicional<Improvements> para cada <SkillName>'Rain Stack'<SkillName> que Yota <Effects>possuir<Effects>. Em seguida, Yota ganha 1 <SkillName>'Rain Stack'<SkillName>.

skills.name: Weather Manipulation Rain: Water Spheres
skills.description: Yota <Defense>gains 15 points of damage reduction<Defense>* and <Damage>deals 10 damage<Damage> to all enemies for 2 turns. Each turn, <Effects>Yota cries<Effects> and gains 1 <SkillName>'Rain Stack'<SkillName>. During this time, If <Classes>Yota is stunned<Classes>, he will <Effects>cry<Effects> even more, gaining 1 additional <SkillName>'Rain Stack'<SkillName> and <Defense>healing 10 health<Defense>.
skills.descriptionBR: Yota <Defense>ganha 15 pontos de redução de dano<Defense>* e <Damage>causa 10 de dan<Damage>o a todos os inimigos por 2 turnos. A cada turno, <Effects>Yota chora<Effects> e ganha 1 <SkillName>'Rain Stack'<SkillName>. Durante esse tempo, se <Classes>Yota for atordoado<Classes>, ele <Effects>chorará<Effects> ainda mais, ganhando 1 <SkillName>'Rain Stack'<SkillName> adicional e <Defense>curando 10 de vida<Defense>.

skills.name: Wather Manipulation Lightning
skills.description: Yota sends a devastating lightning strike to obliterate all enemies, <Damage>dealing 10 affliction damage<Damage> to them for each <SkillName>'Rain Stack'<SkillName> Yota currently has.
skills.descriptionBR: Yota envia um devastador raio para aniquilar todos os inimigo, <Damage>causando 10 de dano aflitivo<Damage> a eles para cada <SkillName>'Rain Stack'<SkillName> que Yota possui atualmente.

skills.name: Yota is happy don't bother him
skills.themeName: Yota is happy don't bother him
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Yota (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade faz Edo Tensei Yota (S) <Defense>invulnerável<Defense> por 1 turno.

skills.name: Rain Stack
skills.description: Each time Yota cries, he intensifies the rain on the battlefield, gaining 1 Rain Stack and enhancing her skills.
skills.descriptionBR: Toda vez que Yota chora, ele intensifica a chuva no campo de batalha, ganhando 1 Rain Stack e fortalecendo suas habilidades.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Jiroubou (S)
characters.description: Reanimated by Kabuto during the Fourth Shinobi World War along with his Sound Four teammates, Jiroubou is back on the battlefield, and is out for blood. With immense brute force through his mastery of the Cursed Seal, as well as his Earth Release and chakra absorption techniques, Jiroubou is a threat to anyone.
characters.descriptionBR: Reanimated by Kabuto during the Fourth Shinobi World War along with his Sound Four teammates, Jiroubou is back on the battlefield, and is out for blood. With immense brute force through his mastery of the Cursed Seal, as well as his Earth Release and chakra absorption techniques, Jiroubou is a threat to anyone.

skills.name: Flying Strike
skills.description: Jiroubou strikes an enemy dealing 25 damage to them and giving them 1 stack of 'Dark Chakra Unseal'.
skills.descriptionBR: Jiroubou golpeia um inimigo, causando 25 de dano a ele e concedendo 1 stack de 'Dark Chakra Unseal'.

skills.name: Boulder Throw
skills.description: Jiroubou throws a giant rock at the enemy team, dealing 10 damage to them and giving them 1 stack of 'Dark Chakra Unseal'. Aftewards, Jiroubou gains 10 points of permanent destructible defense.
skills.descriptionBR: Jiroubou arremessa uma rocha gigante na equipe inimiga, causando 10 de dano a eles e concedendo 1 stack de 'Dark Chakra Unseal'. Depois disso, Jiroubou ganha 10 pontos de defesa destrutível permanente.

skills.name: Hostage Kidnapping
skills.description: For 2 turns, Jiroubou kidnaps an enemy, making them ignore all helpful effects and this skill will be replaced by 'Hostage Drain'. This skill will consume all stacks of 'Dark Chakra Unseal' from that enemy to last 1 additional turn per stack consumed.
skills.descriptionBR: Por 2 turnos, Jiroubou sequestra um inimigo, fazendo com que ele ignore todos os efeitos defensivos, e essa habilidade será substituída por 'Hostage Drain'. Essa habilidade irá consumir todos os stacks de 'Dark Chakra Unseal' desse inimigo para durar 1 turno adicional por stack consumido.

skills.name: Jiroubou Bare Hands Block
skills.description: This skill makes Jiroubou invulnerable for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: This skill makes Jiroubou invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Hostage Drain
skills.description: Jiroubou targets an enemy affected by 'Hostage Kidnapping', stealing 10 health from them and 1 bloodline ou genjutsu chakra, and granting them 1 stack of 'Dark Chakra Unseal'.
skills.descriptionBR: Jiroubou alveja um inimigo afetado por 'Hostage Kidnapping', roubando 10 de vida dele e 1 bloodline ou genjutsu chakra, e concedendo a ele 1 stack de 'Dark Chakra Unseal'.

skills.name: Dark Chakra Unseal
skills.description: Enemies affected by 'Dark Chakra Unseal' will receive 5 additional damge from Jiroubou's skills.
skills.descriptionBR: Inimigos afetados por 'Dark Chakra Unseal' irão receber 5 de dano adicional das habilidades de Jiroubou.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Kidoumaru (S)
characters.description: Reanimated by Kabuto during the Fourth Shinobi World War along with his Sound Four teammates, Kidoumaru is happy to be back in action and wreaking havoc once again. Terrorizing the battlefield with his many spider-based jutsu, enhanced by his Cursed Seal, Kidoumaru is a menace to all who cross his path.
characters.descriptionBR: Reanimated by Kabuto during the Fourth Shinobi World War along with his Sound Four teammates, Kidoumaru is happy to be back in action and wreaking havoc once again. Terrorizing the battlefield with his many spider-based jutsu, enhanced by his Cursed Seal, Kidoumaru is a menace to all who cross his path.

skills.name: The Spider's Web
skills.description: Kidoumaru enables his skills and targets all enemies permanently. Every time they use a new skill, they will gain 1 'Web Stack'. This skill ignores invulnerability. This skill will be replaced by 'Sticky Golden Arrow'.
skills.descriptionBR: Kidoumaru ativa suas habilidades e mira em todos os inimigos permanentemente. Toda vez que eles usarem uma nova habilidade, eles ganham 1 'Web Stack'. Essa habilidade irá ignorar invulnerabilidade e será substituída por 'Sticky Golden Arrow'.

skills.name: Sticky Gold Kunai
skills.description: Kidoumaru deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy and stuns their non-mental skills for 1 turn. Afterwards, all enemies will be dealt 5 piercing damage for each 'Web Stack' they have.
skills.descriptionBR: Kidoumaru causa 20 de dano perfurante a um inimigo e irá atordoar as habilidades não-mental dele por 1 turno. Depois disso, todos os inimigos irão receber 5 de dano perfurante para cada 'Web Stack' que eles tiverem.

skills.name: Giant Spider Web
skills.description: Kidoumaru traps all enemies in a giant web, granting them 1 additional 'Web Stack' and then making them deal 10 less non-affliction damage for 1 turn. This skill cannot be countered.
skills.descriptionBR: Kidoumaru prende todos os inimigos em uma teia gigante, concedendo 1 'Web Stack' adicional a eles e então fazendo com que eles causem 10 a menos de dano não-affliction por 1 turno. Essa habilidade não pode ser anulada.

skills.name: Curse Mark Third Eye
skills.description: Kidoumaru activates his Curse Mark, becoming invulnerable for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Kidoumaru ativa sua Marca da Maldição, tornando-se invulnerável por 1 turno.'Multi-Shot'.

skills.name: Sticky Golden Arrow
skills.description: Using the Sticky Golden Arrow, Kidoumaru destroys all destructible defense one enemy has and deals 25 piercing damage to them, consuming all 'Web Stack' they have to deal 10 additional damage per stack.
skills.descriptionBR: Usando Sticky Golden Arrow, Kidoumaru destrói a defesa destrutível de um inimigo e causa 25 de dano perfurante a ele, consumindo todas as 'Web Stack' que ele tiver para causar 10 de dano adicional por stack.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Sakon (S)
characters.description: Reanimated by Kabuto during the Fourth Shinobi World War along with their Sound Four teammates, Sakon and Ukon relish being on the battlefield once again. Dynamically splitting and merging their bodies through the use of their Cursed Seal, the twins fight as a powerful unit, showing no mercy to anyone.
characters.descriptionBR: Reanimated by Kabuto during the Fourth Shinobi World War along with their Sound Four teammates, Sakon and Ukon relish being on the battlefield once again. Dynamically splitting and merging their bodies through the use of their Cursed Seal, the twins fight as a powerful unit, showing no mercy to anyone.

skills.name: Enhanced Gatling Punch
skills.description: Sakon rapidly punches one enemy, dealing 20 damage and 15 piercing damage to them. For 1 turn, that enemy deal 15 less non-affliction damage and will be unable to become invulnerable. The following turn, 'Parasite Demon' will be improved and deal 20 affliction damage instead.
skills.descriptionBR: Sakon golpeia rapidamente um inimigo, causando 20 de dano e 15 de dano perfurante a ele. Por 1 turno, esse inimigo irá causar 15 a menos de dano não-affliction e não poderá se tornar invulnerável. No próximo turno, 'Parasite Demon' será aprimorada e irá causar 20 de dano aflitivo.

skills.name: Parasite Demon
skills.description: Sakon enters an enemy's body, dealing 20 damage to them and stunning their harmful skills for 1 turn. This skill cannot be used on the same target next turn. The following turn, 'Enhanced Gatling Punch' will deal 5 additional damage.
skills.descriptionBR: Sakon entra no corpo de um inimigo, causando 20 de dano a ele e atordoando suas habilidades ofensivas por 1 turno. Essa habilidade não pode ser usada no mesmo alvo no próximo turno. No próximo turno, 'Enhanced Gatling Punch' irá causar 5 de dano adicional.

skills.name: Summoning: Triple Rashoman
skills.description: Sakon summons the walls of triple Rashoman, removing all harmful skills from him and gaining 15 points of destructible defense for every skill he has used in the game. This skill will increase its current cooldown by 1 for every 15 destructible defense granted. These stacks reset when used.
skills.descriptionBR: Sakon invoca as paredes do triplo Rashoman, removendo todas as habilidades ofensivas dele e ganhando 15 pontos de defesa destrutível para cada habilidade que ele usou no jogo. Essa habilidade irá aumentar seu cooldown atual em 1 para cada 15 de defesa destrutível concedida. Esses stacks são resetados quando usada.

skills.name: Sakon: Chakra Unseal
skills.description: This skill makes Sakon invulnerable for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: This skill makes Sakon invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Tayuya (S)
characters.description: Edo Tensei Tayuya was resurrected by Kabuto as a cruel battlefield conductor, her malice and arrogance undimmed by death. She uses her cursed flute to summon demonic warriors and unravel enemies through sound-based genjutsu and mental pressure. As the fight drags on, her control tightens, turning chaos into a carefully orchestrated nightmare.
characters.descriptionBR: Edo Tensei Tayuya was resurrected by Kabuto as a cruel battlefield conductor, her malice and arrogance undimmed by death. She uses her cursed flute to summon demonic warriors and unravel enemies through sound-based genjutsu and mental pressure. As the fight drags on, her control tightens, turning chaos into a carefully orchestrated nightmare.

skills.name: Demonic Melody
skills.description: Tayuya deals 10 affliction damage to all enemies for 3 turns. During this time, if they use a new harmful damage skill, Tayuya will steal 5 health from them. The following 3 turns, 'Doki Ghost' will be improved.
skills.descriptionBR: Tayuya causa 10 de dano aflitivo a todos os inimigos por 3 turnos. Durante esse tempo, se eles usarem uma nova habilidade ofensiva de dano, Tayuya irá roubar 5 de vida deles. Nos próximos 3 turnos, 'Doki Ghost' será aprimorada.

skills.name: Doki Ghost
skills.description: Tayuya summons her doki ghosts, dealing 20 affliction damage to one enemy. While improved, this skill will also steal 1 ninjutsu or bloodline chakra.
skills.descriptionBR: Tayuya invoca seus doki ghosts, causando 20 de dano aflitivo a um inimigo. Quando aprimorada, essa habilidade também irá roubar 1 ninjutsu ou bloodline chakra.

skills.name: Summoning: Doki Demons
skills.description: For 1 turn, the first harmful damage skill used on her, or an ally, will be countered. If successful, the countered enemy will be dealt 5 damage and will have their harmfull skills stunned for 1 turn. This skill is invisible.
skills.descriptionBR: Por 1 turno, a primeira habilidade ofensiva de dano usada nela ou em um aliado será counterada. Se for bem-sucedido, o inimigo counterado irá receber 5 de dano e terá suas habilidades ofensivas atordoadas por 1 turno. Essa habilidade é invisível.

skills.name: Tayuya: Chakra Unseal
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Tayuya (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade faz Edo Tensei Tayuya (S) <Defense>invulnerável<Defense> por 1 turno.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Kimimaro (S)
characters.description: Edo Tensei Kimimaro was resurrected by Kabuto as an unfeeling weapon of war, his loyalty and discipline preserved even beyond death. He wields the Shikotsumyaku Kekkei Genkai to turn his own skeleton into blades and armor, growing stronger the longer he remains unbroken. Every strike hardens his defenses, and every moment of restraint builds toward an inevitable, bone-shattering end.
characters.descriptionBR: Edo Tensei Kimimaro was resurrected by Kabuto as an unfeeling weapon of war, his loyalty and discipline preserved even beyond death. He wields the Shikotsumyaku Kekkei Genkai to turn his own skeleton into blades and armor, growing stronger the longer he remains unbroken. Every strike hardens his defenses, and every moment of restraint builds toward an inevitable, bone-shattering end.

skills.name: Bone Rush
skills.description: Kimimaro rushes one enemy, dealing 20 damage to them and gaining 1 stack of 'Bone Spikes'. This skill will deal 10 additional damage for every 2 stacks of 'Bone Spikes'.
skills.descriptionBR: Kimimaro avança contra um inimigo, causando 20 de dano a ele e ganhando 1 stack de 'Bone Spikes'. Essa habilidade irá causar 10 de dano adicional a cada 2 stacks de 'Bone Spikes'.

skills.name: Skeleton Splinters
skills.description: Kimimaro unleashes sharpened bone shards at all enemies, dealing 15 piercing damage to them and gaining 1 stack of 'Bones Spikes'. This skill will deal 5 additional damage for every 2 stacks of 'Bone Spikes'.
skills.descriptionBR: Kimimaro libera fragmentos ósseos afiados em todos os inimigos, causando 15 de dano a eles e ganhando 1 stack de 'Bone Spikes'. Essa habilidade irá causar 5 de dano adicional a cada 2 stacks de 'Bone Spikes'.

skills.name: Dead Man's Skewer
skills.description: Kimimaro impales his opponents, dealing 40 piercing damage to one enemy and 15 piercing damage to all other enemies. This skill cannot be countered, and requires at least 4 stacks of 'Bone Spikes' to be used, and all stacks are removed afterwards.
skills.descriptionBR: Kimimaro empala seus oponentes, causando 40 de dano perfurante a um inimigo e 15 de dano perfurante a todos os outros inimigos. Essa habilidade não pode ser counterada, requer pelo menos 4 stacks de 'Bone Spikes' para ser usada, e todos os stacks são removidos após o uso.

skills.name: Shikotsumyaku Guard
skills.description: For 1 turn, he gains 30 points of destructible defense. During this time, any enemy that uses a new non-mental skill on Kimimaro will be dealt 5 piercing damage and Kimimaro will gain 1 stack of 'Bone Spikes'.
skills.descriptionBR: Por 1 turno, ele ganha 30 pontos de defesa destrutível. Durante esse tempo, qualquer inimigo que usar uma nova habilidade não-mental em Kimimaro irá receber 5 de dano perfurante e Kimimaro ganhará 1 stack de 'Bone Spikes'.

skills.name: Bone Spikes
skills.description: Every time Kimimaro gains 1 stack of 'Bone Spikes', he will gain 5% unpierceable damage reduction permanently. During this time, any enemy that uses a new non-mental skill on Kimimaro will take 3 piercing damage*. This skill stacks, and cannot be removed.
skills.descriptionBR: Toda vez que Kimimaro ganha 1 stack de 'Bone Spikes', ele ganha 5% de redução de dano não perfurável permanentemente. Durante esse tempo, qualquer inimigo que usar uma nova habilidade não-mental em Kimimaro irá receber 3 de dano perfurante*. Essa habilidade acumula e não pode ser removida.

characters.name: White Snake Kabuto (S)
characters.description: Following Orochimaru's death at the hands of Sasuke, Kabuto got access to his master's DNA, implanting it in his body and eventually gaining many freakish, snake-like features. In his new form, Kabuto allies himself with Tobi to wage war on the shinobi world, controlling the Edo Tensei forces from the shadows.
characters.descriptionBR: Após a morte de Orochimaru pelas mãos de Sasuke, Kabuto teve acesso ao DNA de seu mestre, implantando-o em seu próprio corpo e eventualmente adquirindo várias características bizarras semelhantes às de uma cobra. Em sua nova forma, Kabuto se alia a Tobi para travar guerra contra o mundo shinobi, controlando as forças do Edo Tensei nas sombras.

skills.name: Snake Coil
skills.description: Kabuto uses his snake to coil around an enemy's body, <Damage>dealing 10 affliction damage<Damage> to them permanently. During this time, if that enemy <Classes>uses a new harmful skill<Classes>, Kabuto will <Defense>heal 10 health<Defense>. This skill stacks but will <Effects>end<Effects> if <Effects>used on a different enemy<Effects> or <Effects>if Kabuto is killed<Effects>.
skills.descriptionBR: Kabuto usa sua cobra para se enrolar ao redor de um inimigo, <Damage>causando 10 de dano aflitivo<Damage> a ele permanentemente. Durante esse tempo, se esse inimigo <Classes>usar uma nova habilidade ofensiva<Classes>, Kabuto irá <Defense>curar 10 de vida<Defense>. Essa habilidade acumula, mas <Effects>termina<Effects> se for <Effects>usada em um inimigo diferente<Effects> ou <Effects>Kabuto morrer<Effects>.

skills.name: Edo Tensei Technique
skills.description: Kabuto <Damage>deals 25 affliction damage<Damage> to one enemy and <Effects>stuns<Effects> their <Classes>harmful skills<Classes> for 1 turn. If <Classes>that enemy is killed<Classes> in this turn, they will become an <Invisible>Edo Tensei<Invisible> and will <Effects>replace<Effects> one of Kabuto's allies <Classes>if they die<Classes> or <Classes>if they are currently dead<Classes>, returning them to <Defense>35 health<Defense>. This effect triggers once per game.
skills.descriptionBR: Kabuto <Damage>causa 25 de dano aflitivo<Damage> a um inimigo e <Effects>atordoa<Effects> as <Classes>habilidades ofensivas<Classes> dele por 1 turno. Se <Classes>esse inimigo for morto<Classes> nesse turno, ele se tornará um <Invisible>Edo Tensei<Invisible> e irá <Effects>substituir<Effects> um dos aliados de Kabuto <Classes>se eles morrerem<Classes> ou <Classes>se já estiverem mortos<Classes>, retornando com <Defense>35 de vida<Defense>. Esse efeito é ativado uma vez por partida.

skills.name: Edo Tensei Summoning: Akatsuki
skills.description: Kabuto <Defense>gains 60 points of destructible defense<Defense>, and <Effects>replaces<Effects> his skills by the alternate version <Defense>until it is destroyed<Defense>.
skills.descriptionBR: Kabuto <Defense>ganha 60 pontos de defesa destrutível<Defense> e <Effects>substitui<Effects> suas habilidades pela versão alternativa <Defense>até que a defesa seja destruída<Defense>.

skills.name: White Snake Awakening
skills.description: This skill makes White Snake Kabuto (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade faz White Snake Kabuto (S) <Defense>invulnerável<Defense> por 1 turno.

skills.name: Edo Tensei: Clay Clone
skills.description: Kabuto targets one enemy for 1 turn. If that enemy <Classes>uses a new harmful skill<Classes>, they will be <Defense>countered<Defense> and will be <Damage>dealt 20 piercing damage<Damage>. <Invisible>This skill is invisible<Invisible>.
skills.descriptionBR: Kabuto marca um inimigo por 1 turno. Se esse inimigo <Classes>usar uma nova habilidade ofensiva<Classes>, ela será <Defense>counterada<Defense> e ele irá <Damage>receber 20 de dano perfurante<Damage>. <Invisible>Essa habilidade é invisível<Invisible>.

skills.name: Edo Tensei: Totsuka Blade
skills.description: Kabuto <Damage>deals 20 piercing damage<Damage> to one enemy and <Effects>removes 1 bloodline or genjutsu<Effects> from them.
skills.descriptionBR: Kabuto <Damage>causa 20 de dano perfurante<Damage> a um inimigo e <Effects>remove 1 bloodline ou genjutsu chakra<Effects> dele.

skills.name: Edo Tensei: Flame Mask
skills.description: Kabuto <Damage>deals 20 affliction damage<Damage> to one enemy and <Effects>stuns their helpful skills<Effects> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Kabuto <Damage>causa 20 de dano aflitivo<Damage> a um inimigo e <Effects>atordoa as habilidades defensivas<Effects> dele por 1 turno.

skills.name: Edo Tensei: Human Path
skills.description: Kabuto <Damage>steals 20 health<Damage> from one enemy and <Effects>stuns their harmful skills<Effects> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Kabuto <Damage>rouba 20 de vida<Damage> de um inimigo e <Effects>atordoa as habilidades ofensivas<Effects> dele por 1 turno.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Fuu (S)
characters.description: Reanimated by Kabuto during the Fourth Shinobi World War, Fuu has had the Seven-Tails, Choumei, sealed back inside her. Having been made into one of Tobi's new Six Paths of Pain along with the other fallen jinchuuriki, Fuu is under his full control, skillfully utilizing the Seven-Tails' various insect abilities.
characters.descriptionBR: Reanimada por Kabuto durante a Quarta Guerra Mundial Ninja, Fuu teve o Sete-Caudas, Choumei, selado de volta dentro de si. Tendo sido transformada em um dos novos Seis Caminhos da Dor de Tobi, junto com os outros jinchuuriki caídos, Fuu está sob seu controle total, utilizando habilmente as várias habilidades inseticidas do Sete-Caudas.

skills.name: Majestic Sting
skills.description: Fuu <Damage>deals 15 damage<Damage> to one enemy. The following turn, that enemy will <Improvements>receive 10 additional damage<Improvements> from Fuu's skills.
skills.descriptionBR: Fuu <Damage>causa 15 de dano<Damage> a um inimigo. No turno seguinte, esse inimigo <Improvements>receberá 10 de dano adicional<Improvements> das habilidades de Fuu.

skills.name: Nanabi: Flying Assault
skills.description: Fuu becomes <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn and <Damage>deals 30 damage<Damage> to one enemy <Classes>ignoring invulnerability<Classes>.
skills.descriptionBR: Fuu se torna <Defense>invulnerável<Defense> por 1 turno e <Damage>causa 30 de dano<Damage> a um inimigo, <Classes>ignorando a invulnerabilidade<Classes>.

skills.name: Scale Powder Blinding Attack
skills.description: Fuu <Damage>deals 10 piercing damage<Damage> to one enemy and makes them unable to <Defense>reduce damage<Defense> or <Defense>become invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn. The following turn, that enemy <Damage>will take another 10 damage<Damage> and will be <Effects>stunned<Effects> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Fuu <Damage>causa 10 de dano perfurante<Damage> a um inimigo e o torna incapaz de <Defense>reduzir o dano<Defense> ou <Defense>invulnerável<Defense> por 1 turno. No turno seguinte, esse inimigo <Damage>sofrerá mais 10 de dano<Damage> e ficará <Effects>atordoado<Effects> por 1 turno.

skills.name: Fuu: Rinnegan Awareness
skills.description: This skill may be used to cast the last skill used by Fuu, <Improvements>costing random chakra<Improvements> and <Improvements>dealing 5 additional damage<Improvements>. Afterwards, the original version of the casted skill will be unable to be used by Fuu for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Esta habilidade pode ser usada para conjurar a última habilidade usada por Fuu, <Improvements>sem custo<Improvements> e <Improvements>causando 5 de dano adicional<Improvements>. Depois disso, a versão original da habilidade usada não poderá ser usada por Fuu por 1 turno.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Yugito (S)
characters.description: Reanimated by Kabuto during the Fourth Shinobi World War, Yugito has had the Two-Tails, Matatabi, sealed back inside her. Having been made into one of Tobi's new Six Paths of Pain along with the other fallen jinchuuriki, Yugito is under his full control, fighting her foes using the Two-Tails' fiery feline powers.
characters.descriptionBR: Reanimada por Kabuto durante a Quarta Guerra Mundial Ninja, Yugito teve o Duas-Caudas, Matatabi, selado de volta dentro de si. Transformada em um dos novos Seis Caminhos da Dor de Tobi, junto com os outros jinchuuriki caídos, Yugito está sob seu controle total, lutando contra seus inimigos usando os poderes felinos do Duas-Caudas.

skills.name: Cat Claws
skills.description: Yugito <Damage>deals 15 damage<Damage> to one enemy and <Effects>stuns<Effects> their non-mental skills for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Yugito <Damage>causa 15 de dano<Damage> a um inimigo e <Effects>atordoa<Effects> suas habilidades non-Mental por 1 turno.

skills.name: Fiery Mouse Hairball
skills.description: Yugito <Damage>deals 15 damage<Damage> to one enemy and <Effects>removes 1 taijutsu chakra<Effects> from them.
skills.descriptionBR: Yugito <Damage>causa 15 de dano<Damage> a um inimigo e<Effects> remove 1 taijutsu chakra<Effects> dele.

skills.name: Nibi: Rage Punch
skills.description: Yugito <Effects>destroys<Effects> all <Effects>destructible defense<Effects> of one enemy, <Damage>deals 15 piercing damage<Damage> to them and <Effects>kills<Effects> them if their <Defense>health<Defense> drops to 10 or less.
skills.descriptionBR: Yugito <Effects>destrói<Effects> toda a <Effects>defesa destrutível<Effects> de um inimigo, <Damage>causa 15 de dano perfurante<Damage> e o <Effects>mata<Effects> se sua <Defense>vida<Defense> cair para 10 ou menos.

skills.name: Yugito: Rinnegan Awareness
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Yugito (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade faz Edo Tensei Yugito (S) <Defense>invulnerável<Defense> por 1 turno.

skills.name: Passive: Nibi Awakening
skills.description: Every time Yugito uses a <Classes>new harmful skill<Classes>, she <Improvements>gains 10 additional damage<Improvements>, stacking until she stops using new harmful skills. If Yugito passes 2 turns without using a new harmful skill, her skills will cost 1 random chakra for 1 turn. The bonus damage may only stack up to a maximum of 30.
skills.descriptionBR: Cada vez que Yugito usa uma nova <Classes>habilidade prejudicial<Classes>, ela <Improvements>ganha 10 de dano adicional<Improvements>, acumulando até que ela pare de usar novas habilidades prejudiciais. Se Yugito passar 2 turnos sem usar uma nova habilidade prejudicial, suas habilidades irão custar 1 random por 1 turno. O dano extra só poderá ser acumulado a um máximo de 30.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Yagura (S)
characters.description: Resurrected through Edo Tensei, Yagura retains perfect control over the Three-Tails' power. His Water Mirror techniques allow him to capture, store, and return enemy techniques with deadly precision, turning an opponent’s own strength against them while remaining nearly untouchable.
characters.descriptionBR: Resurrected through Edo Tensei, Yagura retains perfect control over the Three-Tails' power. His Water Mirror techniques allow him to capture, store, and return enemy techniques with deadly precision, turning an opponent’s own strength against them while remaining nearly untouchable.

skills.name: Water Mirror
skills.description: Yagura targets an enemy for 3 turns. If that enemy uses a new harmful skill, that skill will be permanently stored by 'Water Mirror' and they will deal 5 non-affliction less damage for 1 turn. This skill is invisiblle, ignores invulnerability and cannot be used on the same target.
skills.descriptionBR: Yagura marca um inimigo por 3 turnos. Se esse inimigo usar uma nova habilidade ofensiva, essa habilidade será permanentemente armazenada por 'Water Mirror' e ele irá causar 5 a menos de dano non-affliction por 1 turno. Essa habilidade é invisível, ignora invulnerabilidade e não pode ser usada no mesmo alvo.

skills.name: Hook Staff Tilt
skills.description: Yagura casts a random skill stored by 'Water Mirror' on an enemy. The stored skill is removed. This skill may only be used if 'Water Mirror' has at least one skill stored.
skills.descriptionBR: Yagura conjura uma habilidade aleatória armazenada por 'Water Mirror' em um inimigo. A habilidade armazenada é removida. Essa habilidade só pode ser usada se 'Water Mirror' tiver pelo menos uma habilidade armazenada.

skills.name: Mirror Image
skills.description: Yagura uses Mirror Image on an enemy, dealing 30 damage to them. For 1 turn, they will deal 5 less non-affliction damage and a random harmful skill from that enemy will be stored by 'Water Mirror'. The following turn, 'Hook Staff Tilt' will cast 2 random skills stored by 'Water Mirror' at once.
skills.descriptionBR: Yagura usa 'Mirror Image' em um inimigo, causando 30 de dano a ele. Por 1 turno, ele irá causar 5 a menos de dano non-affliction e uma habilidade ofensiva aleatória desse inimigo será armazenada por 'Water Mirror'. No próximo turno, 'Hook Staff Tilt' irá conjurar 2 habilidades aleatórias armazenadas por 'Water Mirror' ao mesmo tempo.

skills.name: Yagura Partial Tailed Beast Mode
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Yagura (S) invulnerable for 1 turn. The following turn, 'Hook Staff Tilt' will be improved and will cost 1 random chakra instead.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade torna Edo Tensei Yagura (S) invulnerável por 1 turno. No próximo turno, 'Hook Staff Tilt' será aprimorada e custará 1 chakra aleatório em vez disso.

skills.name: Reflective Mirror
skills.description: This skill will be activated every time Yagura uses 'Hook Staff Tilt' or 'Mirror Image'. For 1 turn, Yagura will ignore the first harmful physical or chakra skill used on him. If successfully triggered, the ignored skill will be stored by 'Water Mirror'. This skill will be disabled for 2 turns when it's activated.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade será ativada toda vez que Yagura usar 'Hook Staff Tilt' ou 'Mirror Image'. Por 1 turno, Yagura irá ignorar a primeira habilidade ofensiva physical ou chakra usada contra ele. Se ativada com sucesso, a habilidade ignorada será armazenada por 'Water Mirror'. Essa habilidade ficará desativada por 2 turnos quando for ativada.

characters.name: Young Kushina
characters.description: Kushina is a survivor of the Hidden Whirlpool Village's famed Uzumaki clan, and an immigrant into the Hidden Leaf Village after her own village's downfall. Due to her tomboyish and violent nature, and her bright red colored hair, Kushina is known as the "Red-Hot Habanero" as she constantly gets into trouble.
characters.descriptionBR: Kushina é uma sobrevivente do famoso clã Uzumaki da Vila Oculta do Redemoinho, e uma imigrante da Vila Oculta da Folha após a queda de sua própria vila. Devido à sua natureza agressiva e violenta, e seu cabelo vermelho brilhante, Kushina é conhecida como a 'Pimenta Vermelha Sangrenta', já que está constantemente se metendo em confusão.

skills.name: Red-Hot Habanero
skills.description: Kushina uses her strength to protect an ally. The following 4 turns, if Kushina uses 'Fierce Punch' or 'Dropping Kick', the protected ally will heal 10 health and their new harmful skills will deal 5 additional damage for 1 turn. While active, when 'Dropping Kick' is used, Kushina will ignore stun effects for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Kushina usa sua força para proteger um aliado. Nos próximos 4 turnos, se Kushina usar 'Fierce Punch' ou 'Dropping Kick', o aliado protegido irá curar 10 de vida e suas novas habilidades ofensivas irão causar 5 de dano adicional por 1 turno. Durante esse tempo, quando 'Dropping Kick' for usado, Kushina irá ignorar efeitos atordoantes por 1 turno.

skills.name: Fierce Punch
skills.description: Kushina deals 20 damage to one enemy. For this turn, if any of Kushina's allies uses a new harmful skill on that enemy, that ally will heal 15 health and that enemy will deal 10 less non-affliction damage for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Kushina causa 20 de dano a um inimigo. Neste turno, se qualquer aliado de Kushina usar uma nova habilidade ofensiva nesse inimigo, esse aliado irá curar 15 de vida e esse inimigo irá causar 10 a menos de dano não-affliction por 1 turno.

skills.name: Dropping Kick
skills.description: Kushina deals 10 piercing damage to one enemy. For this turn, if any of Kushina's allies uses a new harmful skill on that enemy, that ally will ignore stun effects and that enemy will be stunned for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Kushina causa 10 de dano perfurante a um inimigo. Neste turno, se qualquer aliado de Kushina usar uma nova habilidade ofensiva nesse inimigo, esse aliado irá ignorar efeitos de atordoamento e esse inimigo será atordoado por 1 turno.

skills.name: Skilled Landing
skills.description: This skill makes Young Kushina <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionBR: Essa habilidade faz Young Kushina <Defense>invulnerável<Defense> por 1 turno.
